IT Network Equipment and Cybersecurity Software RFP

Start Date: 04/01/2026

End Date: 05/15/2026

NAICS: 541512

UNSPSC: 43230000

The City seeks enterprise network switches, firewall appliances, and managed cybersecurity monitoring software for municipal data centers.

Contact: procurement@manteca.gov
